endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ApiManagement/service/{serviceName}/apis/{apiId}/releases
endpoints.description: Lists all releases of an API. An API release is created when making an API Revision current. Releases are also used to rollback to previous revisions. Results will be paged and can be constrained by the $top and $skip parameters.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SERVICENAME}} with a real servicename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{APIID}} with a real apiid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ApiManagement/service/{serviceName}/apis/{apiId}/releases/{releaseId}
endpoints.description: Returns the details of an API release.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SERVICENAME}} with a real servicename. Replace {{APIID}} with a real apiid. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RELEASEID}} with a real releaseid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ApiManagement/service/{serviceName}/apis/{apiId}/releases/{releaseId}
endpoints.description: Creates a new Release for the API.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SERVICENAME}} with a real servicename. Replace {{APIID}} with a real apiid. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RELEASEID}} with a real releaseid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ApiManagement/service/{serviceName}/apis/{apiId}/releases/{releaseId}
endpoints.description: Deletes the specified release in the API.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SERVICENAME}} with a real servicename. Replace {{APIID}} with a real apiid. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RELEASEID}} with a real releaseid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PATCH /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ApiManagement/service/{serviceName}/apis/{apiId}/releases/{releaseId}
endpoints.description: Updates the details of the release of the API specified by its identifier.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SERVICENAME}} with a real servicename. Replace {{APIID}} with a real apiid. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RELEASEID}} with a real releaseid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: HEAD /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ApiManagement/service/{serviceName}/apis/{apiId}/releases/{releaseId}

Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RELEASEID}} with a real releaseid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
